name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America provides same-day payday, installment, and title loans up to $25,000 in Jacksonville, FL with in-store and online applications.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized, fully accredited lender operating physical storefronts and online platforms to serve customers needing quick cash access. The company has been serving millions of people with emergency financial needs and maintains a significant online presence with 200,000+ Google reviews and a 4.9-star rating based on 125,454 reviews. Their Jacksonville location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. operates Monday–Saturday with Spanish-language support available.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms), Installment Loans ($100–$1,000 with longer repayment periods), and Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000, offered in partnership with LoanCenter). All products are available through in-store visits or online applications, with customers able to receive same-day funding. The company also provides Western Union services at their locations. Applicants must provide government-issued ID, proof of income, checking account information, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

Advance America distinguishes itself through high customer satisfaction ratings, bilingual support (Spanish and English), extended operating hours (10 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–6 p.m. Friday, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Saturday), and flexible application methods. The Jacksonville store is conveniently located near major highways (I-95, I-295, I-10) in the Commonwealth Village area. Staff are described in reviews as helpful and thorough in explaining loan processes.

However, as a traditional payday and title lender, Advance America's products carry inherent limitations typical of the emergency-cash category: short repayment terms on payday loans (2–4 weeks), collateral requirements for title loans (vehicle ownership), and absence of disclosed APR information on their public-facing website. These products are structured for short-term cash needs rather than long-term financial solutions or credit building. Consumers should carefully evaluate repayment capacity before borrowing, as rollover debt is a documented risk in this product category.
address: 21638 Libby Rd Unit #432, Maple Heights, OH 44137

company_info.headquarters: 21638 Libby Rd Unit #432, Maple Heights, OH 44137

pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
High customer satisfaction: 4.9-star rating across 125,454+ reviews on Google
Flexible loan options: payday loans, installment loans (longer terms), and title loans up to $25,000
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone pre-qualification available
Bilingual staff support (Spanish and English) at Jacksonville location
Extended hours including Saturday service (9 a.m.–4 p.m.) for working customers
Title loans available up to $25,000, accommodating larger emergency expenses
cons: Payday loans have very short 2–4 week repayment terms, increasing rollover debt risk
Title loans require vehicle collateral and full ownership, creating risk of vehicle loss
APR and fee information not disclosed on public website; requires in-store or phone inquiry
Installment loans capped at $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger needs beyond payday loans
Title loans offered through third-party partner (LoanCenter), not directly by Advance America
best_for: Workers facing unexpected expenses before their next paycheck (payday loans)
Employed individuals with stable income seeking loans larger than payday amounts ($1,000–$25,000)
Vehicle owners needing substantial cash quickly with collateral available (title loans)
Spanish-speaking consumers in Jacksonville seeking accessible, bilingual lending
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed Jacksonville residents facing immediate cash shortages between paychecks or needing emergency funds up to $25,000 secured by vehicle title. The main caveat is that payday and title loans are inherently high-cost, short-term products with significant rollover debt risk; customers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family assistance) before applying and must have clear repayment ability to avoid debt traps.
services: Installment Loans ($100–$1,000 with extended repayment schedules)
Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000 using vehicle as collateral)
Online loan applications with same-day funding
Extended Saturday hours for retail access

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
